---
title: "Technical methodlogy"
subtitle: |
  How we collate and process data to calculate the Index

listing:
  id: "methodology-listing"
  contents: articles
  type: default
  date-format: "DD-MMM-yyyy"
  fields: [title, subtitle]

format:
  html:
    toc: false
    title-block-banner: true

execute: 
  echo: false
---

The Index provides comparative benchmarking data on the activities and
performance of civil services around the world. Using its measurement
framework, the Index brings together X individual data points from Y sources.
The articles in this section explain the methodology used to collate, process
and calculate the Index.


:::{#methodology-listing}
:::
